title: Visual Overhaul + Release Pipeline
summary: Complete UI/UX overhaul of the website and launcher, modpack manager mode, and release pipeline hardening.
changes: Launcher is now a modpack manager — syncs mods/configs, then you launch via the official Minecraft launcher (fixes online server auth)
New dark theme with blue accents across the entire website and launcher UI
Removed particle effects, glass/transparency, and animated gradients for a cleaner look
Flat, clean surfaces with subtle borders replace previous cyberpunk styling
Release tag verification added to CI — builds now fail if the Git tag does not match APP_VERSION
MadGod v2: Event-based AI system replaces always-on chaos
TZP Launcher: Custom launcher replaces CurseForge
Website dashboard with bug reports and patch notes
Fixed diamond/netherite zombie spam from NightmareMode
Added Curios API for Gobber accessories
Fixed AFK disconnect (/afk now prevents idle kick)
3 new performance mods: C2ME, Noisium, ServerCore
Initial release: 170+ mods, MadGod AI companion
NeoForge 1.21.1 with MineColonies, Mekanism, Create, and more
Custom TZP Vanilla Bridge mod for server integration
